prompt: I need to migrate our entire application from the old Kubernetes cluster to a new one in a different region. All data, configs, and services need to move permanently. This isn't a quick switch — it's a full relocation.
Set up a permanent teleportation circle between our development and production environments so deployments flow automatically. I want a continuous delivery pipeline, not a one-time jump.
Our SSH access to the bastion host is blocked because the key expired. I can't get into any of our servers. I need to rotate the SSH key and restore access through the proper channel.
I need to copy the entire production database to staging for testing. It's 200GB and needs to be an exact replica. Not switching between them — duplicating one to the other.
Transform our monorepo into separate repositories for each service. This is a permanent structural change, not a context switch between different views of the same code.
I want to discover what environments and services exist in our cloud account. I don't know what's out there — I need to explore and map the infrastructure before I can work in it.
